use_cases: Retro-themed web applications requiring nostalgic Windows 98 UI aesthetics
Educational software demonstrating historical interface design
Gaming interfaces with vintage computer game styling
Portfolio pieces showcasing CSS shadow and skeuomorphic design mastery
Mockups and prototypes of classic Windows-style application interfaces
ai_summary: A Windows 98-style skeuomorphic button component featuring authentic triple-inset shadow effects, silver background, and press state transitions. The component implements the classic beveled 3D appearance with proper disabled states using text shadows and layered box shadows to recreate the iconic Win98 button experience.
